name: Prairie Operating Co.
summary: Prairie Operating Co. is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on acquiring and developing crude oil, natural gas, and NGLs. Operations are concentrated in Weld County, Colorado within the Denver-Julesburg (DJ) Basin. As of December 31, 2025, the company holds approximately 45,000 net leasehold acres in Central Weld Assets and approximately 23,000 net leasehold acres in Genesis Assets, seeking growth through drilling and accretive acquisitions.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Production and sale of crude oil from DJ Basin assets in Weld County, Colorado.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and sale of natural gas from DJ Basin leasehold acreage.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Production and sale of NGLs derived from DJ Basin operations.
